sentences.arabic: تَعَانِي بِلَادٌ كَثِيرَةٌ مِنَ التَّغَيُّرِ المُنَاخِيِّ هَذَا العَامَ.
sentences.translation: Mnoge zemlje ove godine pate od klimatskih promjena.
sentences.translationEn: Many countries are suffering from climate change this year.

sentences.arabic: ارْتَفَعَتْ دَرَجَاتُ الحَرَارَةِ بِشَكْلٍ كَبِيرٍ فِي فَصْلِ الصَّيْفِ.
sentences.translation: Temperature su značajno porasle tokom ljetne sezone.
sentences.translationEn: Temperatures rose significantly during the summer season.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ العُلَمَاءُ إِنَّ الجَفَافَ يُؤَثِّرُ عَلَى الزِّرَاعَةِ وَالمِيَاهِ.
sentences.translation: Naučnici kažu da suša utječe na poljoprivredu i vodu.
sentences.translationEn: Scientists say that drought affects agriculture and water.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، تَعْمَلُ الحُكُومَاتُ عَلَى زِرَاعَةِ المَزِيدِ مِنَ الأَشْجَارِ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga vlade rade na sađenju više drveća.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, governments are working on planting more trees.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الجَمِيعِ الحِفَاظُ عَلَى نَظَافَةِ البِيئَةِ.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone must maintain the cleanliness of the environment.
